imageAlt: MTD for Income Tax | practice dashboard #1 roadmap item preview image
title: MTD for Income Tax | practice dashboard #1
summaryBody:
How might we provide accountants/bookkeepers with a consolidated view of their clients' MTD IT obligations, so that compliance can be managed efficiently and they provide clients with timely, informed advice?

Phase #1 - show upcoming submissions
Phase #2 - show filed submissions, show client approval status, Alert rule - submission due in less than xx days
Phase #3 - bulk actions
detailBody:
